task_objective: Fix dropdown selection, simplify labels, clean up version strings, and integrate frontend logging.
design_decisions: Simplified DropdownItem rgOptions labels to remove redundant status text.
Corrected selectedOption mapping to use the raw state value directly.
Injected console.log and console.error throughout the frontend for better Decky log visibility.
Cleaned up Ludusavi version string in the backend to remove leading prefix.
Added detailed Python docstrings to all backend modules for better maintainability.
results: All requested UI fixes and backend enhancements implemented. Verified via automated tests and manual build check.
